repair_candidate.summary: Repair #94011 in-place on the contributor branch if the failing checks-node-core-fast result is reproducible. The intended fix remains narrow: classify the generic "LLM request failed" downstream/provider failure as a transient server_error only where cron retry/model fallback classification expects retryable provider failures.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cron): treat generic LLM request failures as retryable
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repairs #94011 so generic downstream `LLM request failed` errors engage cron retry/model fallback as `server_error`
- keeps the change limited to embedded-agent error classification

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers/errors.test.ts

Credits: source PR #94011 by @ajwan8998.
credit_notes: Credit #94011 and @ajwan8998 as the source PR/author if this repair lands or is replaced.
